10.reason: [逻辑错误：条件使用||导致当s[i]为'-'且前后字符类型不同时，既不满足此条件也不满足后续else if，导致该'-'字符未被输出。同时缺少边界检查，当i=0或i=len-1时访问越界。]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: When i=0, s[i-1] accesses index -1, which is out of bounds. Also, the condition s[i-1]>=s[i+1] is evaluated even when s[i] is not '-', causing unnecessary out-of-bounds access.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error: When i=0, s[i-1] accesses index -1, causing undefined behavior. Also, the condition should be '&&' not '||' to correctly skip non-expandable cases.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [When i==0, s[-1] is out‑of‑bounds; when i==strlen(s)-1, s[i+1] is the null terminator, which may cause incorrect logic.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [逻辑错误：条件使用||导致当s[i]为'-'且前后字符类型不同时，既不满足此条件也不满足后续else if，导致该'-'字符未被输出。同时缺少边界检查，当i=0或i=len-1时访问越界。]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Accessing s[i-1] when i=0 and s[i+1] when i=strlen(s)-1 causes out-of-bounds memory access. Additionally, when s[i]=='-' and the surrounding characters are of different types, the condition evaluates to false, but there is no else clause to print the '-', causing it to be omitted from the output.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Accessing s[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds error. Also, logical flaw: when s[i]=='-' and types differ but s[i-1]<s[i+1], it falls through without printing '-', losing the character.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Accesses s[i-1] and s[i+1] without checking bounds (e.g., when i=0 or i is last index), leading to undefined behavior; also logic flawed as it prints '-' even in invalid expansion cases]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Accesses s[i-1] and s[i+1] without checking bounds (e.g., when i=0 or i is last index), leading to undefined behavior; also logic flaw: should not print '-' in expansion cases]

11.reason: Error: When i is at the last index, s[i+1] accesses index strlen(s), which is out of bounds. Also, the condition does not check that both characters are lowercase letters; it only checks ranges that include other characters.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: When i is at the last index, s[i+1] accesses index strlen(s), which is out of bounds. Also, the condition does not check that both characters are lowercase letters; it only checks ranges that include other characters.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error: The condition uses '<' and '>' with character comparisons, but the logic is incorrect; it should check if both characters are lowercase letters. Also, s[i-1] and s[i+1] may be out of bounds at string boundaries.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Same out‑of‑bounds issue for s[i-1] and s[i+1] at the boundaries.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Accessing s[i+1] when i points to the last character causes out-of-bounds error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Boundary checks are incorrect: 'a'-1 and 'z'+1 are not safe; should use >= 'a' && <= 'z'; also accesses s[i-1]/s[i+1] without ensuring i>0 and i<len-1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect character range checks: 'a'-1 and 'z'+1 are not proper bounds; should use >= 'a' && <= 'z']
